itemListElement.reviewBody: "My daughter, Adya, from 2C, is enjoying going to school every day. I appreciate the way VGSP takes efforts to engage children in various aspects, such as introducing new cultural heritage from different countries through the Australian Fest, which encourages them to explore more. The extra-curricular activities are highly appreciated. I want to thank the faculty for being friendly and supportive."
Best School for children to learn many things in simple way. I love send my daughter to school because they way treat children was sooo good. Keep up good work 👍 long way to go

I am writing to express my appreciation for the positive experience my son is having in Pre KG at Velammal global school. I would like to highlight a few aspects that have impressed me so far:

Digital App Integration: the velammal digital app is a fantastic initiative. It provides parents like me the opportunity to stay informed about my child's daily activities and learning progress through engaging visual content such as pictures. This transparency and communication are highly valuable to me as a parent.

Dedicated Staff: I would like to commend my son's class teachers Ms.Zepporah and Mrs.Sreelakshmi for their warm and welcoming approach. Their genuine care and connection with my son, have truly made a positive impact. It brings me immense joy to witness how well my toddler has settled within a span of 2 weeks of joining the school, thanks to the support and encouragement provided by these dedicated educators.

Engaging Activities: I am delighted to see the thoughtfully planned activities for the kids and how engaged they are. Also events like red day celebrations are good initiatives. It is heartwarming to observe my child actively participating and learning through such interactive and stimulating experiences.

Uniform Selection: The choice of uniform is excellent. The color and material selected are not only visually appealing but also practical in terms of maintenance. I appreciate how easy it is to care for the uniform while ensuring that my child feels comfortable throughout the day.

Caretakers and Security: I also want to express my gratitude to the caretakers and security personnel at the school who are humble, dedicated, and doing an excellent job of taking care of the children. Their attentiveness and commitment to ensuring the well-being and safety of the students are commendable.

Overall, I am grateful for the supportive environment and quality education that my child is receiving at the school. Thank you for the commitment and dedication of the staff in ensuring a nurturing and enriching experience for all the students.

Looking forward to continued positive experiences with the institution

Hi, I am the father of Sheril Mithra.M, who is in Grade 2-C. We are really happy with the Velammal Global School, Puzhal and have noticed a positive difference in our daughter compared to her previous school. We had our first PTC today, we especially want to highlight her class teacher Mam Hamsa Meena, who always has a smile on her face, which gives us extra confidence that our daughter is in good hands. We look forward to the days ahead.

Last year (September 2023), we decided to switch our kid from LKG(CBSE), the reason being his previous school’s teaching approach was more books oriented and focus on extra curricular activities were comparatively less. Due to this approach, there were very little chances given to the kids to exhibit their creative side.

So, we started exploring multiple schools(CBSE, ICSE, IGCSE) till November 2023 and finally chose VGSP. To start with, we had a lot of questions on the curriculum (IGCSE), teaching approach and how the school’s environment will help our kid to easily adapt. The Principal, Ms.Sripriya Mam, answered all our questions patiently and even gave us a chance to talk to few of their students in person. This really gave us the confidence that our kid will have a nourishing environment where he can learn, have fun and grow.

Today it’s been a month since our kid started in KG2 and we are really happy that we have made the right decision. Witnessing our kid going to school happy and excited right from the first week shows the kind of positive environment the school creates. The opportunities and recognitions he receives from his class teacher,  Ms.Suganya mam is a testimony for itself.

A big thanks to the faculty members who take great efforts to make learning more fun, thank you!

I am Parent of Ram Ganesh 8B and we recently moved from abroad and got admission for my son in Velammal Global institution. Before we enrolled in this institution, we had our dilemma like every parent on the curriculum, I.e., to opt for State Board, CBSE, IB or IGCSE. Principal and co-ordinator helped us with the necessarily inputs and based on our own assessment we felt IGSCE may help my son better. Principal and  Co-ordinator have spent their quality time with us through various online and face to face meet.

My son started the school from June 2024 and been a month now. I take this time to thank Management, Principal, Teachers for their thoughtfulness on the structure of daily communication of updating each day’s subject class work and homework which deserves a great appreciation. This dedication means a lot to us as it helps in prepare my son in a structured way.  We have a respect for Teachers for the relentless efforts in imparting concepts, communication and feedback mechanism.

Today Parents Engagement program held at Velammal global campus was very interesting & engaging. I was back to my days having such fun around with my friends. Such activities taken care by Management is well appreciated. Wish all the kids to have brighter future & wonderful academic year ahead.

Thanks again for the invite.
Balakumaran J.
F/O Pavan Kandhan (2C)

Am mom of twin kids who is studying in VGSP, Grade 1A. As a parent we impressed with your curriculum and teaching methods which is different from other schools. Well planned worksheets for practice makes my child think beyond prescribed Textbooks. Especially the SLC (student led conf)where kids develop their self confidence level, communication and their gesture. special thank  to Ayesha mam, you really osm mam.
As always.. A Great school.. Very good teachers and management. Happy to be a parent in VGSP..
